backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the press kit backend, managing content (about text, features, game details, links), password protection, user profiles, and access control via included authorization and blob-storage mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping three press kit page features (logo display, background image, section ordering) to their implementing file and associated test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-line summaries of every frontend source file, serving as a reference index for the project's frontend architecture.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based light and dark mode design tokens as CSS custom properties for colors, borders, and UI components.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell for the React app, loading Fredoka One and Inter fonts from Google Fonts and mounting the app at the root div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component setting up TanStack Router with three routes (/,  /press-kit, /admin), QueryClientProvider, ThemeProvider, and a BodyTextColorApplier that syncs backend color to a CSS variable.
frontend/src/components/FullscreenViewer: Overlay component that displays a single screenshot fullscreen with keyboard (Escape) and click-to-close support.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Minimal site header showing only a Press Kit nav link and dark/light mode toggle, hidden entirely on the /admin route.
frontend/src/components/ImageWithFallbac: Image component that shows an animated skeleton while loading and an 'Image unavailable' placeholder on error.
frontend/src/components/MediaDownloadBut: Button component that triggers a direct browser download of the screenshots ZIP file via a programmatically clicked anchor element.
frontend/src/components/NewsletterPlaceh: Non-functional newsletter signup form with an email input and subscribe button, intended as a placeholder for future implementation.
frontend/src/components/PasswordGateModa: A full-screen modal overlay that prompts users for a password to access the press kit, verifying it against the backend actor and storing the result in sessionStorage.
frontend/src/components/ScreenshotsGalle: Renders a responsive grid of six game screenshots that open in a fullscreen viewer when clicked.
frontend/src/components/SocialMediaSecti: Displays an Instagram icon link that adapts its color to the current theme, rendering nothing if the provided URL is invalid.
frontend/src/components/VideoSection.tsx: Shows a video thumbnail with a play button overlay; clicking it replaces the thumbnail with an embedded YouTube iframe using a parsed embed URL.
frontend/src/contexts/ThemeContext.tsx: Provides a light/dark theme context that persists the user's preference to localStorage and toggles a 'dark' CSS class on the document root.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React Query hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous backend actor, initializing admin access control when an identity is present.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions and identity state to child components.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating press kit content (about, features, game details, social links, etc.) via the backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet defining Tailwind base layers, CSS custom properties for light/dark themes, and utility styles for the background, screenshots, game logo, and fullscreen viewer.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboard.tsx: Admin dashboard page that allows an authenticated Internet Identity principal to edit press kit content fields (about, features, game details, social links, colors, password protection) via mutation hooks.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Simple landing page displaying the game logo and a Brevo newsletter signup iframe, with a footer crediting caffeine.ai.
frontend/src/pages/PressKitPage.tsx: Press kit page that fetches content from the backend, enforces an optional password gate, and renders ordered sections: logo, video, about, game details, features, screenshots, download button, socials, and press email.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL query parameters from both regular and hash-based routes, persisting them to sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive params from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom fonts (Fredoka One, Inter), an oklch-based color palette with semantic tokens, border radii, box shadows, and keyframe animations for accordion and fade-in effects.
project_state.json: Project state metadata tracking existing features, pending action requests (responsive logo, background image, content ordering on press kit page), architectural notes, and known issues for the PokeANose press kit site.
